facebook.caption:
749 reviews. 4.7 stars. And most tourists walk right past it.

Tween's Kitchen on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the real deal. Vietnamese food done right, priced right, in the middle of Phu Quoc's main drag. $15-30 a person and you'll leave full and happy.

No gimmicks. No tourist-trap menu. Just solid cooking that locals and repeat visitors keep coming back for.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Fork hits the bowl. Steam rises. 749 people gave this place 4.7 stars and it's right on the main street in Phu Quoc. Tween's Kitchen, Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. $15-30 a head. Go.
